still the output not present

If the code is not producing the output you expect, there could be a few issues to check:

1. Make sure you have set up the trigger for the `onEdit` function. Go to the "Edit" menu in your Google Sheets document, select "Current project's triggers", and make sure there is a trigger set up for the `onEdit` function.
2. Check that the sheet name and cell references in your code are correct. Make sure that the sheet name and cell references match the name and location of the cell(s) you want to modify. If you have changed the name or location of the cell(s), then you will need to update the code accordingly.
3. Try running the code manually. You can do this by going to the "Tools" menu in your Google Sheets document and selecting "Script editor". In the script editor, select the `addTimestamp` function and click the "Run" button. This will run the function with a default edit event and help you identify any issues with the code.
4. Check that you have the necessary permissions to run the script. Make sure that you are logged in to the correct Google account and that you have permission to modify the document.
5. Check to see if there are any errors in the Google Sheets Script log. To access the log, go to the "View" menu in the script editor and select "Logs".

If none of these solutions work, please provide more details on what output you are expecting and what output you are seeing.
